title: Create the JSON section file
body: Create a new file in `backend/seeds/data/sections/` with the full section structure. Include all metadata fields and an array of content blocks.
code:
{
  "title": "My New Section",
  "slug": "my-new-section",
  "description": "What this section covers in one sentence.",
  "icon": "School",
  "order": 15,
  "estimatedMinutes": 30,
  "difficulty": "beginner",
  "prerequisites": ["getting-started"],
  "keyPoints": [
    "First key takeaway",
    "Second key takeaway"
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "heading": "Introduction",
      "headingLevel": 2,
      "body": "Welcome to the new section."
    },
    {
      "type": "code",
      "language": "python",
      "filename": "example.py",
      "description": "A quick example.",
      "code": "print('hello')"
    }
  ]
}
